title: Compliance: firmware/bridge-rust/src/main.rs polling
description: Policy: No-polling. Status: VIOLATION. Has RX polling loop. Fix: use SX1262 DIO1 interrupt instead of polling (u79t).
close_reason: Verified violation: radio_task() uses 100ms polling loop (lines 248-262). Fix tracked in project-LICHEN-u79t (DIO1 interrupt)
